turns.query: Analyze the pollution situation at air quality station: Construction Building on 2025-06-02.
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_pm25 not set
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找"Construction Building"站点的ID
query_station = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%Construction Building%'
""")
station_df = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
print("站点信息:")
print(station_df)

if station_df.empty:
    print("未找到名为'Construction Building'的站点，尝试模糊匹配...")
    query_station_fuzzy = text("""
    SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
    WHERE aqs.name ILIKE '%construction%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%building%'
    LIMIT 20
    """)
    station_df = pd.read_sql(query_station_fuzzy, engine)
    print(station_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有空气质量站点的名称，看看是否有类似"Construction Building"的站点
query_all_stations = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
ORDER BY aqs.name
LIMIT 50
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print("所有空气质量站点前50个:")
print(all_stations)

# 同时搜索dust_station表，因为"Construction Building"可能是建筑工地扬尘监测站
query_dust_stations = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, ds.station_code
FROM dust_station ds
LEFT JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
LIMIT 50
""")
dust_stations = pd.read_sql(query_dust_stations, engine)
print("\n所有扬尘监测站前50个:")
print(dust_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有空气质量站点的名称，查找包含"Construction"或"Building"的站点
query_construction = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name ILIKE '%construction%' 
   OR aqs.name ILIKE '%building%'
   OR aqs.name ILIKE '%工地%'
   OR aqs.name ILIKE '%建筑%'
   OR aqs.name ILIKE '%施工%'
""")
construction_stations = pd.read_sql(query_construction, engine)
print("包含Construction/Building/工地/建筑/施工的站点:")
print(construction_stations)

# 如果没找到，列出所有站点的名称供参考
query_all_names = text("""
SELECT aqs.name FROM air_quality_station aqs ORDER BY aqs.name LIMIT 100
""")
all_names = pd.read_sql(query_all_names, engine)
print("\n所有站点名称前100个:")
print(all_names)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有空气质量站点的完整名称列表，查找"Construction Building"
query_all_station_names = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
ORDER BY aqs.name
""")
all_stations_full = pd.read_sql(query_all_station_names, engine)
print(f"总共有 {len(all_stations_full)} 个空气质量站点")
print("\n所有站点名称:")
print(all_stations_full['name'].tolist())

# 同时检查扬尘监测站是否与建筑工地相关
query_dust_full = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name, ds.station_code, cs.status
FROM dust_station ds
LEFT JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
LIMIT 100
""")
dust_stations_full = pd.read_sql(query_dust_full, engine)
print("\n扬尘监测站前100个:")
print(dust_stations_full)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 检查是否有名为"Construction Building"的站点
query_check = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name = 'Construction Building'
""")
result = pd.read_sql(query_check, engine)
print("精确匹配'Construction Building'的结果:")
print(result)

# 检查扬尘监测站中是否有名为"Construction Building"的
query_dust_check = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, cs.name as construction_site_name
FROM dust_station ds
LEFT JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE ds.name = 'Construction Building'
""")
dust_result = pd.read_sql(query_dust_check, engine)
print("\n扬尘站精确匹配'Construction Building'的结果:")
print(dust_result)

# 列出所有空气质量站点的唯一名称数量
query_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT name) as unique_names FROM air_quality_station
""")
count_df = pd.read_sql(query_count, engine)
print(f"\n空气质量站点唯一名称数量: {count_df['unique_names'].iloc[0]}")

# 列出所有扬尘监测站的唯一名称数量
query_dust_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT name) as unique_names FROM dust_station
""")
dust_count_df = pd.read_sql(query_dust_count, engine)
print(f"扬尘监测站唯一名称数量: {dust_count_df['unique_names'].iloc[0]}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索建设工地中是否有名为"Construction Building"的
query_construction_site = text("""
SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.address, cs.status, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM construction_site cs
LEFT JOIN district d ON cs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON cs.city_id = c.id
WHERE cs.name = 'Construction Building'
""")
result = pd.read_sql(query_construction_site, engine)
print("精确匹配'Construction Building'的建设工地:")
print(result)

# 搜索名称中包含"Construction"或"Building"的建设工地
query_construction_site_fuzzy = text("""
SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.address, cs.status, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM construction_site cs
LEFT JOIN district d ON cs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON cs.city_id = c.id
WHERE cs.name ILIKE '%construction%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%building%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%工地%' OR cs.name ILIKE '%建筑%'
LIMIT 50
""")
result_fuzzy = pd.read_sql(query_construction_site_fuzzy, engine)
print("\n模糊匹配的建设工地:")
print(result_fuzzy)

# 列出所有建设工地的名称样本
query_site_names = text("""
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM construction_site ORDER BY name LIMIT 100
""")
site_names = pd.read_sql(query_site_names, engine)
print("\n建设工地名称样本:")
print(site_names)
